description:
The Legend of Zelda: Skyward Sword HD for Ryujinx

An epic adventure where Link must rescue Zelda and stop the Demon King Ghirahim.
Travel between the Surface and Sky, explore dungeons, and collect items across
a vast interconnected world.

0.7.0.description:
**It's finally here! After less than 2 months, I'm excited to announce the first ever public release of the Skyward Sword HD Archipelago integration!**

# [Skyward Sword HD Archipelago: [BETA] 0.7.0](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/releases/tag/0.7.0) - First Public Release!

What's Included
 - Full item randomization across the entire game with 800+ locations
 - Full logic "borrowed" and integrated from the Skyward Sword HD Randomizer
 - All features from the Skyward Sword HD Randomizer + more are included (and should be working)
 - Progressive items for swords, bows, beetles, wallets, and more
 - Full cross-world integration - play with all your friends across any and all different games!
 - DeathLink - share your deaths with other players
 - BreathLink - share stamina exhaustion with other players (this will also be compatible with the original Skyward Sword Archipelago integration when it gets merged)
 - Quality of life cheats - infinite health, stamina, ammo, and more (configurable in your YAML)
 - Ryujinx emulator support - direct integration for (mostly) seamless gameplay (may add yuzu support in the future if possible)

Getting Started
 - Check the [README.md](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/blob/main/README.md) file on GitHub for instructions

Known Issues
 - This is a BETA release - please report any bugs you encounter on our GitHub or in the Archipelago Unofficial Discord Server
 - There are still some bugs and issues being worked on (sorry)
 - The biggest bug and the one I'm working on currently working on fixing is that Beedle's Airshop does not current send any items

Hope you enjoy, and happy randomizing!
0.7.0.title: [BETA] 0.7.0 - First Public Release!

0.7.0-1.description: Bundles all python packages required for generation so that you can generate without python
0.7.0-1.title: [BETA] 0.7.0-1 - Hotfix

0.7.0-2.description: Fixed the lz4 and other dependency errors
0.7.0-2.title: [BETA] 0.7.0-2 - Bug fix

0.7.0-3.description: Fix `Fill.FillError: Game appears as unbeatable. Aborting.` and various issues with item placements
0.7.0-3.title: [BETA] 0.7.0-3 - Bug fixes (yyaaayyyyy, so much fun /s)

0.7.0-4.description:
# CHANGELOG

## Added
- Alternate logo

## Fixes
- World version mismatch now fixed
- Starting tablets now work properly
- Goddess Chests now required a sword to be in logic
- Goddess Chests no longer activated from the start
- Attempt to fix item receiving issues (might be fixed, might not be, no clue)
- Beedles Airshop no longer allows AP Items

## Changes
- Better logic
0.7.0-4.title: [BETA] 0.7.0-4 - Hotfixes and bugfixes

0.7.1.description:
## What's Changed Since [[BETA] 0.7.0](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/releases/tag/0.7.0)
* Fixed bundled python deps by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/1
* Fixed bug with starting tablets by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/ef91a70edf11845d765a35a1784011567036def2
* Fixed goddess chests always being in logic, even when you have no sword by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/281525995d0607f38097df4686e5c65c35be90f2
* Fixed goddess chests being activated from the start by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/faaede5afa7f59955381d39360c6a395f75ba5d1
* Add New Logo by @RayStormThunder and @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/2, https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/8d34d840893d02d82de3200b37e14b15bbb59270, and https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/6c1ba04c0d8a883b01cb1aeeda3f2135d83dfefe
* Update logic by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/3
* Add temporary Beedle's Airshop workaround (no AP Items allowed in his shop) by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/5
* Make base address scanning faster and better by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/5328e5e160e34d9c948cc4df27dd82d14199b73e and https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/1e4535f9ce77ea4ccd6fe8868945314ba9cd7a33
* Finished adding Linux support by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/6
* Fixed BIG item receiving bug by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/4 and https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/7
* Removed Goddess Stone Hints as locations by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/a949616f3c91d06061e297d867210d205d110739
* Fix scrolling by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/109b949c8b7cf4cabbbc063c5046b0f96ee5ade8
* Fixed bugs relating to checks not sending (more specifically the Academy Bell and the Lumpy Pumpkin Chandelier) by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/6871257c1a0cfcc679d86257a721a98240b764be
* Fixed bugs relating to dungeon rewards, progressive items, bird status being enabled from the start, randomized entrances not following logic, and excluded locations not being excluded by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/e726b8550612a582bd6b40eb5a084b4ab4e29856
0.7.1.title: [BETA] 0.7.1 - More stable + fixed major bugs/issues!

0.7.2.description:
## What's Changed Since [[BETA] 0.7.1](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/releases/tag/0.7.1)
* Added separate patcher (useful for big syncs/asyncs)
* Forced base address to be 8/8 before it stops scanning (stops issues with getting a bad base address)
* Added more actions to BUSY_PLAYER_ACTIONS
* Fixed progressive swords bug
* Fixed triforce placement bug
* Fixed boss/small key placement bug

All by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/8
0.7.2.title: [BETA] 0.7.2 - Separate patcher + major bug fixes

0.7.2-1.description:
## What's Changed Since [[BETA] 0.7.2](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/releases/tag/0.7.2)
*Fixed defeat demise crashing game and not releasing checks
*Fixed not having all extra heart containers/pieces in item pool
*Fixed defeat boss and life tree fruit checks not sending
*Fixed tadtones being shuffled still when off
*Made excluded locations junk instead of vanilla
0.7.2-1.title: [BETA] 0.7.2-1 - More bug fixes

0.7.3.description:
## What's Changed Since [[BETA] 0.7.2-1](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/releases/tag/0.7.2-1)
* Fix scene transitions crashing game due to cheats not having a safe-guard in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/0f16f4c92525a4937d337e915a15647ebc9084d6
* Add new no_electric_stun cheat in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/420ceacb0628efad8513097c771c069be96cd773
* Fix isle strike crest checks not sending in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/33dce55e7085529520ff1a37ca5e2dadfca65820
* Fix sea chart not being received in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/33dce55e7085529520ff1a37ca5e2dadfca65820
* Fix some boss checks not sending in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/33dce55e7085529520ff1a37ca5e2dadfca65820
* Fix demise causing crashes after defeat in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/33dce55e7085529520ff1a37ca5e2dadfca65820
* Fix Kikwi Elder not sending checks in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/b7ccdd060f97a0851b417c56717074ddfd517206
* Fix game crashing when entering/leaving flooded faron woods in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/63272f67b5fc97dc34fe3da35875fc2c47487f32
* Fix tadtones not sending checks in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/e27f3f9fd0d4b1bdba37aa66bfdc20a4b1f231fc
* Fix AC key boko not sending in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/f41c751f844215f539ea531b51fe65f088d426aa
* Fix dig spots not sending in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/f41c751f844215f539ea531b51fe65f088d426aa
* Fix dusk relics not sending in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/f41c751f844215f539ea531b51fe65f088d426aa
* Fix game crashing when entering boko base or mogma turf in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/14b0e43911caecf2e1f7932edf7f4d710c262929
* Fix silent realm tears not working in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/c8244c2519a01a65bdcc66e158ee6869b90e82b8
* Add custom models (main and unofficial AP logos) in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/9518c2d463c3591a82bee1736e3d068644ce3171
* Fix local progressive swords and beetles not progressing counts properly and replace local progress JSON with AP DataStorage persistence by @2manydoritos in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/10
* Fix AP 0.6.7 and MultiworldGG support by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/11
* Add more filler items by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/12
* Add patch download for webhosts in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/ce665bbf707247f54db76bf3f1fe5a9a6f63b33f
* Fix the demise crash and add some new goal options by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/14
* You now can't get old item and player data for a new item by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/13
* Fix OptionErrors when using Rando GUI in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/faafe79a321caf008c961dbd6be4ccb507a3cba2
* Fix Death/Breath Link sending on save and quit in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/202c27fd0fe3e5ba4bb602030b4e6a2560b6327e
* Fix crash on save and quit in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/7410bbebb9ec27ac9462d26aabf25cc159c8659b
* Fix could not access Temple of Hylia error in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/7084af782f089f838406f7845b310367ae1a128a
* Add categories for options creator in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/fa73f0c252e20202eb45a5b6da131a8a5e23a13a
* Fix Isle of the Song crest item(s) in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/4052ec2dd8f95a8c914425ecda70ef222c32c66e
* Fix goddess chests not sending in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/81e6ebc3b27d5dad9a700f2a28447e8c97a00df5
* Fix getting a Guardian Potion + when receiving an item sometimes in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/5cda434fc0c94c4e6ef05bac30211d1dbae88e6d
* Add text shuffle by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/16
* Fix dig spots not sending by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/18
* Add Gate of Time to ER stuff by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/17
* Should fix bird statues that were still having issues by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/19
* Add support for other emulators by @Wesley-Playz in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/15
* Fix patcher not looking in subdirectory in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/c19938e2f3e00e66835c4c159f877faaaa2560ae
* Fix Infinite Stamina not working in Flooded Faron Woods and the Tentalus Boss Fight in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/e7719fb2035ebc2bbd151407276730c096c322ee
* Fix Infinite Loftwing Charges not working in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/e7719fb2035ebc2bbd151407276730c096c322ee
* Fix Moon Jump not working if y-velocity is not greater than or less than 0 in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/f4147cd904d4d9904bf5d9c02c55f34a2c8db383
* Add Hovercraft cheat (finally) and fix Moon Jump in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/commit/c547df104dae26a51fd1aaf87dd78a26e44ebe0e

## New Contributors
* @2manydoritos made their first contribution in https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/pull/10
0.7.3.title: [BETA] 0.7.3 - Dedicated Rando Build!

Continuous.description:
**Automated build from latest commit**

This is an automatically generated build from the latest code.
For stable releases, see the [Releases](https://github.com/LonLon-Labs/SSHD_APWorld/releases) page.

**No Python installation required!** Download `sshd.apworld`, `ArchipelagoSSHDClient.zip`, and `ArchipelagoSSHDPatcher.exe`.

### Quick Install
1. Place `sshd.apworld` in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder
2. Extract `ArchipelagoSSHDClient.zip` and run `ArchipelagoSSHDClient.exe`
3. Run `ArchipelagoSSHDPatcher.exe` to apply patches from a lightweight `.apsshd` file

**Commit**: 4067448a5f9cf4629d0b3273c9269a9966079bf6
**Branch**: main
Continuous.title: Continuous Build
